case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. WILLIS BALDRIDGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 98 (TRANSACTION ID # 64108437) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-16-2019 - APPEARANCES BY ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT WILLIS BALDRIDGE -- PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF AT TRIAL CALL, THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED.
